actionUnits.condition: Manually invoke AnchorVisuals.OnAnchorEnter to simulate teleport ray hover entering the anchor selection. MonoBehaviour (script guid b2dd7fabdb14fca498bd9e0def11ab19) at script_fileID 3953368309659336407 with serialized settings: m_FadeAnimation=fileID 8970193181346821320, m_Arrow=fileID 8134302612814971439, m_TargetArrowHeight=1, m_ArrowAnimationDuration=0.375, m_AnimationCurve per scene modifications. No m_Calls UnityEvent listed, so this needs manual triggering for coverage.
Manually invoke AnchorVisuals.HideArrowOnTeleport to simulate the moment of teleporting (arrow should be hidden). Same MonoBehaviour component (script_fileID 3953368309659336407).

Manually invoke AnchorVisuals.OnAnchorExit to simulate teleport ray exiting the anchor selection and to exercise reverse fade and arrow tween back to 0. Same MonoBehaviour component (script_fileID 3953368309659336407).
